entries.text:
Verses 1-31

CHAPTER 44

1. The outward eastern gate for the prince (Ezekiel 44:1-3)

2. The charge concerning the strangers and the rebellious tribes (Ezekiel 44:4-14)

3. The charge concerning the priests, the sons of Zadok (Ezekiel 44:15-27)

4. The inheritance of the priests (Ezekiel 44:28-31)
